overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing a character in a spacesuit with a red backpack walking through a narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor with steam effects and overhead lighting. The character progresses down the metal-grated hallway toward a pressure door, creating a tense, atmospheric mood typical of space station or spaceship interiors.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial spaceship corridor with steam vents

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the industrial corridor, passing wall machinery and storage lockers

entered.detail: dark metal wall panels with rivets and industrial texture lining the corridor
warm yellow circular ceiling lights illuminating the corridor at intervals
network of metal pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
metal grate flooring with visible texture beneath
industrial equipment and panels mounted on the right wall
volumetric steam or fog effects drifting through the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor with warm overhead lighting and atmospheric steam effects. Metal wall paneling lines the left side while machinery and storage units occupy the right, creating a claustrophobic sci-fi environment.

events.description: approaching pressure-sealed airlock door at the end of the corridor
turning right to enter the doorway

agents.ego_description: approaching the pressure door on the right side and preparing to enter the adjacent room

entered.detail: heavy industrial pressure door with frame and sealing mechanism
wall-mounted control interface next to the door

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the corridor and approaches a pressure-sealed airlock door on the right. The camera turns toward the doorway as the character prepares to enter, transitioning from the main hallway into a new space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic industrial corridor that culminates at a pressurized airlock. It begins with the character walking down a narrow, dimly lit hallway where warm overhead lighting cuts through atmospheric steam. As the character progresses, the camera glides past metal wall paneling on the left and various machinery and storage units on the right. The scene then shifts as the character reaches the end of the corridor, with the camera turning toward a pressure-sealed airlock door on the right. The movement finally settles on the doorway as the character prepares to transition from the main hallway into a new space.
